title: Mod Observer
description: Mod that checks other mod's presence. Upon joining a server that requires you to install this mod, it checks, if the loaded mods are allowed or not.
body:
**DISCLAIMER: This project is experimental**

ModObserver, as the name suggests, observes, which mods are loaded, and upon joining a server, sends those mods to the server. The server owner can adjust, which mods are allowed and which are not.

When you try to join a server, that requires you to have ModObserver, you will get a kick message similar to this one:
![ModObserver required message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GgQcIIex/images/e0b63da80df8d0bae40b75600219a9e2692dfb6e.png)

**For server owners: if you want ModObserver on your server, download this plugin: https://modrinth.com/plugin/mod-observer-plugin**
